title: Japanese Font Better
description: A resource pack that restores the authentic pixel style of the Japanese font.
body:
![日本語フォント改良](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e89fd90b8dac29bd4deec09e509cbdd8c36304f.png)
This resource pack **replaces the default Japanese font** with a true **pixel-style bitmap font**.  In the vanilla game, Japanese characters appear thin and non-pixelated, which **does not reflect the authentic look**.
## Features
- Includes bitmap PNGs for:
  - **Kana** (Hiragana: 87 characters, Katakana: 90 characters)  
  - **Kanji** (CJK: 6,356 characters)
  - **Latin Extended** (15 characters)
  - **Miscellaneous Symbols** (338 characters)
  - **Arrows** (6 characters)
  - **Mathematical Symbols** (37 characters)
  - **Technical Symbols** (1 character)
  - **Block Elements** (17 characters)
  - **Geometric Shapes** (16 characters)
  - **General Symbols** (15 characters)
- Based on the free-to-use **Misaki Gothic 2 (美咲ゴシック第2)** font
- Makes Japanese text in-game **sharper, more authentic**, and faithful to the **classic pixel aesthetic**
